reviews.comment:
una vergüenza los baños. hace años eran ejemplo de limpieza ahora de ida y de vuelta un asco.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are a disgrace. Years ago they were a model of cleanliness, now they're disgusting, both going in and out.

reviews.comment:
No podes pasar, y no llevarte un sandwich de crudo y queso. Todo casero.
Un clasico de Los Altares.

(Translated by Google)
You can't go in without getting a ham and cheese sandwich. All homemade.
A Los Altares classic.
